olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics, Biology, Chemistry and Physics in not more than 2 sittings
notes: One of the most competitive courses in Nigeria. Only accredited federal universities offer MBBS. Physics may be replaced by Mathematics at some schools — verify with your institution.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics, Biology, Chemistry and Physics
notes: Some universities accept Mathematics instead of Physics as the 4th subject. Check your school's specific requirements.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics, Biology, Chemistry and Physics
notes: Offered in both universities and Schools of Nursing. University-based nursing leads to a BNSc degree.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics and Physics
notes: Mathematics and Physics are compulsory. Some schools accept Economics as a 4th subject — confirm with your institution.

s4: Any Arts or Social Science subject
olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language and Literature in English
notes: Literature in English and Government are strongly recommended. Some schools accept History in place of Government.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry
notes: All engineering courses require Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry. JAMB Use of English is the compulsory 1st subject.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics and Economics
notes: Mathematics and Economics are compulsory. The 4th subject varies by school — Government, Geography or Commerce are commonly accepted.

s4: Commerce or Government or any Social Science
olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics and Economics
notes: Also known as Accountancy at some institutions. Financial Accounting at O'Level is an advantage.
Flexibility in subject choices exists. Strong English Language performance is essential for this course.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language, Mathematics, Biology or Agriculture, and Chemistry
notes: Students with O'Level Agricultural Science have an advantage. Some schools accept Geography or Economics as an additional subject.

olevel: 5 O'Level credits including English Language and Mathematics
notes: Lower cut-off than pure Mathematics. Education courses generally have lower minimum JAMB requirements across Nigerian universities.
